caption: A man wearing a dark suit jacket over a white shirt stands on a stage during a presentation at EuroPython in Edinburgh on July 23, 2018, as indicated by the footer text and logo. In the first frame, he stands beside a slide titled "DON'T UNDERESTIMATE HIDDEN COMPLEXITIES" which lists challenges like "Complexity of staging and deploying ML models" and "Monitoring of ML ecosystem." As the presentation progresses, the slide changes to a white screen stating, "After CryptoML was caught using deep learning... ...they were featured in the top 10 global news." The man continues to gesture while speaking. Later, a new slide appears titled "INTRODUCING CELERY" featuring an image of celery and the bullet points "Distributed," "Asynchronous," "Task Queue," and "For Python." The final scene shows the man gesturing toward a slide containing Python code and the header "CONSUMER - STEP 2: CELERIZE IT."
